name: aleksis-app-chronos

metadata.name: AlekSIS-App-Chronos
metadata.summary: AlekSIS (School Information System) — App Χρόνος (digital timetables)

documentation:
# AlekSIS (School Information System) — App Χρόνος (digital timetables)

## AlekSIS

This is an application for use with the [AlekSIS®] platform.

## Features

- Consider object-level rules and permissions
- Export timetables as PDF
- Search in rooms
- Show absent groups in timetable
- Show absent teachers in timetable
- Show affected groups in timetable
- Show affected teachers in timetable
- Show supervisions in timetable
- Timetables per day
- Timetables per group
- Timetables per person
- Timetables per room
- Timetables per week
- Smart timetable

(including all other official language versions).

## Trademark

AlekSIS® is a registered trademark of the AlekSIS open source project, represented

[trademark policy]: https://aleksis.org/pages/about

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.managers.LessonDataQuerySet.next_lesson
documentation:
Get another lesson in an ordered set of lessons.

By default, it returns the next lesson in the set. By passing the offset argument,
the n-th next lesson can be selected. By passing a negative number, the n-th
previous lesson can be selected.

This function will handle week, year and validity range changes automatically
if the queryset contains enough lesson data.
Overrides default QuerySet to add specific methods for lesson data.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.LessonPeriod._equal_lesson_periods
documentation: Get all lesson periods with equal lessons in the whole school term.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.LessonPeriod.next
documentation:
Get next lesson period of this lesson.

:::{warning}
To use this property, the provided lesson period must be annotated with a week.
:::

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.LessonPeriod.prev
documentation:
Get previous lesson period of this lesson.

:::{warning}
To use this property, the provided lesson period must be annotated with a week.
:::

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.LessonPeriod.is_replaced_by_event
documentation: Check if this lesson period is replaced by an event.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.SupervisionSubstitution.time_range
documentation: Get the time range of this supervision substitution.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.Event.raw_period_from_on_day
documentation:
Get start period on the annotated day (as TimePeriod object).

If there is no date annotated, it will use the current date.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.Event.raw_period_to_on_day
documentation:
Get end period on the annotated day (as TimePeriod object).

If there is no date annotated, it will use the current date.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.Event.period_from_on_day
documentation:
Get start period on the annotated day (as period number).

If there is no date annotated, it will use the current date.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.Event.period_to_on_day
documentation:
Get end period on the annotated day (as period number).

If there is no date annotated, it will use the current date.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.Event.get_start_weekday
documentation: Get start date of an event in a specific week.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.Event.get_end_weekday
documentation: Get end date of an event in a specific week.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.Event.annotate_day
documentation: Annotate event with the provided date.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.Event.get_groups
documentation: Get groups relation.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.Event.get_teachers
documentation: Get teachers relation.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.Event.time_range
documentation: Get the time range of this event.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.ExtraLesson.get_groups
documentation: Get groups relation.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.ExtraLesson.get_teachers
documentation: Get teachers relation.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.ExtraLesson.get_subject
documentation: Get subject.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.ExtraLesson.time_range
documentation: Get the time range of this extra lesson.

classes.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.AutomaticPlan

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.AutomaticPlan.current_start_day
documentation: Get first day which should be shown in the PDF.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.AutomaticPlan.current_end_day
documentation: Get last day which should be shown in the PDF.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.AutomaticPlan.get_context_data
documentation: Get context data for generating the substitutions PDF.

methods.name: aleksis.apps.chronos.models.AutomaticPlan.check_update
documentation: Check if the PDF file has to be updated and do the update then.
Model for configuring automatically updated PDF substitution plans.
